section:
Class List Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:zmq::from_handle_t::_privateKTN::Mdp3::AdminHeartbeat312KTN::Mdp3::AdminLogin315KTN::Mdp3::AdminLogout316KTN::AlgoBaseV3
The base class for algos, implementing market data callbacks and session management AlgoFactory
Factory class responsible for launching various algorithms AlgoHdgEncoderAlgoHeader
Structure representing the header of an algorithm KTN::ALGO::AlgoHelpers
Helper class for various algorithmic functions and calculations AlgoInitializer
The AlgoInitializer struct represents the parameters required to initialize the algorithm algoinstr
Structure representing a plain instrument AlgoJson
Static method to format algorithm statistics into JSON algoleg
Structure representing an algorithm leg algomd
Structure representing algorithm market data algometa
Structure representing algorithm metadata KTN::AlgoMktDataCallback
Abstract base class that defines the interface for receiving market data updates AlgoPLCallback
Abstract class that defines the interface for handling profit and loss events KTN::REPORTER::AlgoPLReporter
Responsible for reporting the position data KTN::AlgoServiceBrokerV3
Routes messages to and from child instances of AlgoBaseV3 AlgoState
Represents the state of an algorithm AlgoStats
Structure representing the types of algorithm statistics KTN::REPORTER::AlgoV3Reporter
Responsible for reporting generic statistics KTN::Core::AllocatorBase< T >
The AllocatorBase class is a generic allocator class that provides different allocator types based on the selected options KTN::CME::IL3::AppMessageFactoryFastV2KTN::CME::IL3::AppMessageGen
This class is used to generate CME IL3 application messages and provide pre-filled templates for them AppMsgProc
This class handles the processing of CME iLink3 application messages atomicquote
Structure representing an atomic quote AuditTrailWriter
This class is responsible for writing audit trail logs AuditTrailWriterV3
Represents a ultra low latency class for writing audit trail logs using SPSC RingBuffer Queues KTN::AutoHedgeOBAutoHedgeOB2Params
Struct representing the parameters for AutoHedgeOB2 algorithm KTN::Core::BatchPool
A class that represents a pool of message batches pliedMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelRejectMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelReplaceRejectMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::OrderMassActionReportMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsDefinitionRequestAckMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsListReportMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::QuoteCancelAckMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::QuoteCancelMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::RequestForQuoteAckMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::RequestForQuoteMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::RetransmissionMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::RetransmitRejectMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::SecurityDefinitionRequestMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::SecurityDefinitionResponseMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::SequenceRecvMsg::BlockDataKTN::CME::IL3::TerminateRecvMsg::BlockDataKTN::BOOKS::Bookbookmd
Structure representing book market data KTN::BOOKS::BookMoleculeKTN::Core::BufferPool
Pool of buffers KTN::Core::BufferPoolV2
Buffer pool for managing KTNPktBuf objects KTN::CME::IL3::META::BusinessRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::BusinessRejectMsgKTN::NET::ByteWriter
Class for writing bytes to a buffer KTN::Feeds::CME::channelKTN::CME::CmeAlgoKTN::CME::CmeGT5
CmeGT5 class represents the 5th Generation CmeHandler. Low latency order template creation; memory pool usage and custom maps and memory management. It provides better, faster, and stronger functionality for handling CME exchange iLink3 Messages KT01::MSGW::CmeMsgw
CME Message Gateway KT01::SECDEF::CmeProdDef
Class representing the CME product definition KT01::SECDEF::CmeSecDef
Class representing the CME security definition KT01::SECDEF::CmeSecMaster
Class that loads and indexes CME Security Definitions. This is a singleton class CmeSessionSettings
Represents the settings for a CME session CmeSettingsHelpercombopath
Structure representing a combination path KTN::TCP::EFVITcpV5::ConfKTN::Feeds::CME::ConfigurationKTN::Feeds::CME::connectionKTN::ConnStateConsoleLogger
Responsible for logging messages to the console zmq::context_tKTN::EFVI::csmlatholderCustomHashTable< K, V >
A custom hash table implementation CustomHFTMap
CustomHFTMap class represents a custom ultra low latency hash map implementation KTN::CME::IL3::DATAKTN::Mdp3::Decimal32KTN::CME::IL3::Decimal32NULLKTN::Mdp3::Decimal64KTN::CME::IL3::Decimal64NULLAlgoHdgEncoder::DecodedDataKTN::IdGen::DecodedDataEdgeStruct
Structure representing the edge information ef_rx_sentinelef_rx_sentinel_cfgefvi_tcp_client_stateKTN::TCP::EFVITcpV2
TCP client making use of OpenOnload, TCP socket EPOLL, and EFVI. The class was originally designed for TAS order release KTN::TCP::EFVITcpV5
Represents the EFVITcpV5 class. This is our main TCP class. This class is a true EFVI TCP implementation KTN::TCP::EFVITcpV6KTN::NET::EFVIUdpV3KTN::NET::EFVIUdpV4EngineCommandKTN::EnumBase< Enum, Derived >
Base class for creating enum classes with string conversion support KTN::CME::IL3::EnumSessionStateKTN::Core::EpochNanos
Class that quickly computes the nanos since epoch timestamp KTN::TCP::Epoller
Handles epoll operations for TCP sockets zmq::error_tErrorCodesKTN::CME::IL3::META::EstablishmentAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::EstablishmentAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::EstablishmentRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::EstablishmentRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::EstablishMetaKTN::CME::IL3::EstablishMsgKTN::ExchKTN::ExchangeBase2
Represents the base class for an exchange handler KTN::ExchangeManagerExchCmdExchHandlerLogSvc
This class handles logging for the exchange handler exchinst
Structure representing an exchange instrument ExchStateKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportCancelMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportCancelMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportEliminationMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportEliminationMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportModifyMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportModifyMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportNewMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportNewMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportStatusMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportStatusMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumOutrightMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumOutrightMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumSpreadLegMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumSpreadLegMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumSpreadMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeAddendumSpreadMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeOutrightMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeOutrightMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeSpreadLegMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeSpreadLegMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::ExecutionReportTradeSpreadMetaKTN::CME::IL3::ExecutionReportTradeSpreadMsgExecutionTimer< Resolution >KTN::EFVI::feeddataKTN::TCP::feeddataFileLogger
A class for logging messages to a file FileOrderLoaderV3
A Legacy class for loading order data from a file. Mainly used for testing or for TAS order loading KTN::FillFormatterBase
Base class for JSON formatters zmq::from_handle_tKTN::REPORTER::GenericReporter
Responsible for reporting data genericstats
Class representing generic statistics KTN::ALGO::GoodToGoResultKTN::CME::IL3::groupSizeKTN::Mdp3::groupSizeKTN::Mdp3::groupSize8ByteKTN::CME::IL3::groupSizeEncodingKTN::Mdp3::groupSizeEncodingKTN::CME::IL3::GrpAffectedOrdersMassActionReportKTN::CME::IL3::GrpLegsKTN::CME::IL3::GrpLegs560KTN::CME::IL3::GrpOutrightFillEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpOutrightOrderEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpPartyDetailKTN::CME::IL3::GrpPartyDetails519KTN::CME::IL3::GrpPartyDetailsListReportKTN::CME::IL3::GrpPartyIDsKTN::CME::IL3::GrpQuoteEntriesKTN::CME::IL3::GrpQuoteEntriesMassQuoteAckKTN::CME::IL3::GrpQuoteSetsKTN::CME::IL3::GrpRelatedSymKTN::CME::IL3::GrpRequestingPartyIDsKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSidesKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSpreadFillEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSpreadFillLegEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSpreadFillOrderEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSpreadLegFillEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpSpreadLegFillOrderEventKTN::CME::IL3::GrpTrdRegPublicationKTN::CME::IL3::GrpTrdRegPublications519KTN::CME::IL3::GrpTrdRegPublicationsListReportstd::hash< sole::uuid >HashMap< Key, Value, TableSize >
A hash map implementation that maps keys to values KTN::Core::HeartbeatMonitor
Responsible for monitoring the heartbeat of a system KTN::ALGO::HedgeStateKTN::ALGO::PRICING::HedgeTypeKTN::Core::HugePageAllocator< T >IBufferSender
The interface for sending buffer to the exchange IcebergParamsIceOrdParamKTN::IdGenIExchangeSender
The interface for sending messages to the exchange KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers
Helper functions for the IL3 application IL3AppMsgCallback
Abstract base class that defines the interface for handling various CME iLink3 execution report messages and other related application level messages IL3CertHelpers
Helper class for working with IL3 certification environments. FOR TESTING ONLY KTN::CME::IL3::IL3LoginHelpersKTN::CME::IL3::META::IL3MetaMapILogger
Interface for logging messages IMenu
Interface for menu classes KTN::ALGO::PRICING::ImpliedPricer
Pricing strategy that calculates implied prices based on given orders Instructioninstrument
Structure representing an instrument KTN::ALGO::IntervalTimer
Timer that triggers at regular intervals IOBParamsKTN::ORD::IOrderHandler
Interface for handling order-related operations IParamsIZmqSubscriber
The interface for a ZMQ subscriber KTN::JsonHeaderJsonOrderDecoders
Static methods for decoding JSON orders JsonUrlPosterJsonUrlReader
Responsible for reading JSON data from a URL KEngineCommand
Enumeration for the algo engine commands KEngineItem
Enumeration for the engine items KEngineType
Enumeration for the engine types KTN::ORD::KOrderActionKTN::ORD::KOrderAlgoTriggerKTN::ORD::KOrderExchangeKTN::ORD::KOrderFillTypeKTN::ORD::KOrderProdTypeKTN::ORD::KOrderPutCallKTN::ORD::KOrderSideKTN::ORD::KOrderStateKTN::ORD::KOrderStatusKTN::ORD::KOrderTifKTN::ORD::KOrderTypeKPosStatusKTN::NET::KTN_MSG
Structure representing a KTN binary message container KTN::NET::KTNBuf
Structure representing a KTN buffer KTN::NET::KTNBuf8t
Structure representing a KTN buffer with 8-bit data KtnCmeMbo
Represents a class that handles CME market by order (MBO) data KtnCmeMdpV4
Represents a class that handles CME MDP3 market data KTN::NET::KTNPktBuf
Represents a packet buffer used in the KTNPktBuf class KTN::NET::KTNSimp
Structure representing a simple KTN buffer KTN::EFVI::latholderLegParamParser
Methods to parse and retrieve leg parameters LegPrices
Structure representing the prices of a leg KTN::MD::LimitOrderBookLimitOrderBook
Represents a limit order book KTN::ALGO::PRICING::LittleImpKTN::ALGO::PRICING::LittleImpSideKTN::MD::LockFreeLimitOrderBook
Represents a lock-free implementation of a limit order book Log
Singleton logger for logging messages LoggerFactory
Factory class for creating loggers based on the configuration settings LogLevel
The LogLevel struct represents the different levels of log messages LogMsg
Struct representing a log message LogSvc
Responsible for logging messages. This is a thread-safe class that offloads messages to a ring buffer and then logs them to the console or another dstination KTN::MarginBorrowAmountKTN::CME::IL3::META::MassQuoteAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::MassQuoteAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::MassQuoteMetaKTN::CME::IL3::MassQuoteMsgKTN::Mdp3::MatchEventIndicatorBitsEnumMatrixGen
Responsible for generating spread and outright matrices from the input data KTN::CME::IL3::MaturityMonthYearKTN::Mdp3::MaturityMonthYearmbomd
Structure representing market-by-order market data KTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshBook46KTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshBook46EntryKTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshBook46OrderDetailsKTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshBook47KTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshBook47EntryKTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshTradeSummary48KTN::Mdp3::MDIncrementalRefreshVolume37KTN::MD::MdOrderMdOrder
Represents a market data order KTN::Mdp3::MdOrderBookEntry46KTN::Mdp3::Mdp3MessagePrinterKTN::Mdp3::MDTradeEntryKTN::Mdp3::MDTradeEntryOrderDetailsKTN::Mdp3::MDVolumeEntryKTN::Core::MemPool< T >
A memory pool implementation for efficient object allocation and deallocation Menu
Represents a menu that can be displayed and interacted with MenuCallback
Abstract base class that defines the interface for menu callbacks MenuFactory
Responsible for creating instances of IMenu based on the logger type zmq::message_tKTN::CME::IL3::messageHeaderKTN::CME::IL3::MessagePrinter
Audit Trail and Textual Representation of IL3 Messages KTN::BOOKS::MetaDataKTN::CME::IL3::META::IL3MetaMap::MetaData
Struct to hold metadata information ModOrdPool
ILink3 Modify Order Pool pre-allocates a pool of OrderCancelReplaceRequestMsg objects to be used by the ILink3 handler zmq::monitor_tMS2Params
The struct representing the parameters for the MultiSpreader2 algorithm MsgBatchmsgeventsKTN::Mdp3::MsgHeaderKTN::notify::MsgLevelmsgratemsgstats
Structure representing messaging statistics KTN::notify::MsgTypeKT01::MSGW::MsgwKTN::MultiSpreaderV3
Derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and implements an automated multi-leg spread trading algorithm NamedThread
Represents a named thread with affinity to a specific core KTN::CME::IL3::META::NegotiateMetaKTN::CME::IL3::NegotiateMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::NegotiationRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::NegotiationRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::NegotiationResponseMetaKTN::CME::IL3::NegotiationResponseMsgNetHelpersKTN::CME::IL3::META::NewOrderCrossMetaKTN::CME::IL3::NewOrderCrossMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::NewOrderSingleMetaKTN::CME::IL3::NewOrderSingleMsgNewOrdPool

Responsible for sending notifications via REST KTN::Core::ObjectPool< T >
A generic object pool implementation KTN::OptionsFieldsKTN::OrderKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderCancelRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderCancelReplaceRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelReplaceRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderCancelReplaceRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelReplaceRequestMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderCancelRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderCancelRequestMsgKTN::OrderExceptionKTN::OrderFormatterKTN::ORD::OrderHandlerZmqV6
Handles the ZMQ communication for order handling. It implements the SessionCallback and IZmqSubscriber interfaces OrderHashTable
A hash table implementation for storing orders KTN::OrderHedgeKTN::ALGO::OrderLoader
Responsible for loading orders from a file and providing various order-related functionalities OrderManagerV5
Responsible for managing orders and their execution. It implements the IOrderHandler interface and inherits from the NamedThread class KTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderMassActionReportMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderMassActionReportMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderMassActionRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderMassActionRequestMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderMassStatusRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderMassStatusRequestMsgOrderNums
Singleton class for generating order numbers and request IDs OrderParser
Parses JSON order data and converts it into Order objects KTN::OrderPod
Represents an order in the system KTN::Core::OrderPodPool
Pool of OrderPod objects KTN::Core::OrderPodPool2
A pool of OrderPod objects for efficient memory management KTN::OrderPoolKTN::REPORTER::OrderReporterV5
Responsible for reporting orders OrderRingBuffer
A ring buffer implementation for storing orders KTN::CME::IL3::META::OrderStatusRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::OrderStatusRequestMsgOrderUtilsKTN::ALGO::PRICING::OrderWithHedgeordlvl
Structure representing an order level KTN::Mdp3::PacketHeaderKTN::CME::IL3::META::PartyDetailsDefinitionRequestAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsDefinitionRequestAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::PartyDetailsDefinitionRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsDefinitionRequestMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::PartyDetailsListReportMetaKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsListReportMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::PartyDetailsListRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::PartyDetailsListRequestMsgPerformanceCounterPerformanceTracker
Class for tracking performance measurements PerfTimer
High-resolution performance counter pkt_bufPLMonitor
Class responsible for monitoring and managing profit and loss calculations for positions PLParams
The PLParams struct represents the parameters for the PL algorithm PLPosition
The PLPosition struct represents the position parameters for the PLWatcher algorithm KTN::PLWatcher
Responsible for monitoring the profit and loss of a trading algorithm PLWatcherParams
The PLWatcherParams struct represents the parameters for the PLWatcher algorithm KTN::EFVI::pollbaseKTN::TCP::pollbasePositionPositionJsonConverterPositionLegPositionSimplePosNetKTN::CME::IL3::PRICE9KTN::Mdp3::PRICE9PriceConverters
Utility functions for converting prices KTN::CME::IL3::PRICENULL9KTN::Mdp3::PRICENULL9KTN::ALGO::PRICING::PricingStrategyBase
The base class for pricing strategies KTN::Feeds::CME::productKTN::Feeds::CME::productgroupKT01::MSGW::ProductGwProfitLossSide
Structure representing the profit and loss of a side of a trade (Buy or Sell) pxlvl
Structure representing a price level KTN::CME::IL3::META::QuoteCancelAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::QuoteCancelAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::QuoteCancelMetaKTN::CME::IL3::QuoteCancelMsgQuoterV3
Represents a QuoterV3 class that manages quoting orders and functions KTN::ALGO::QuoteStateRaptor2
Represents the Raptor2 Main Exchange Handler class that extends NamedThread, MenuCallback, and IExchangeSender RCLWT::core::Registration
Registration KTN::TEMPLATE::Reporter< T >
The Reporter class is responsible for reporting data of type T KTN::REPORTER::ReporterBase
The base class for all reporters KTN::CME::IL3::META::RequestForQuoteAckMetaKTN::CME::IL3::RequestForQuoteAckMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::RequestForQuoteMetaKTN::CME::IL3::RequestForQuoteMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::RetransmissionMetaKTN::CME::IL3::RetransmissionMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::RetransmitRejectMetaKTN::CME::IL3::RetransmitRejectMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::RetransmitRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::RetransmitRequestMsgRiskBase
Struct representing the risk parameters for an algorithm RiskLimit
Struct representing a risk limit RiskLimitChecker
Class for checking risk limits for orders RiskLimits
Risk limits for a particular trading account KTN::RiskManager
Handles risk management operations KTN::ZF::rx_msgKTN::CME::IL3::SBEHeaderKTN::CME::IL3::META::SecurityDefinitionRequestMetaKTN::CME::IL3::SecurityDefinitionRequestMsgKTN::CME::IL3::META::SecurityDefinitionResponseMetaKTN::CME::IL3::SecurityDefinitionResponseMsgKTN::Mdp3::SecurityStatus30KTN::Mdp3::SecurityStatus30FastKTN::CME::IL3::META::SequenceMetaKTN::CME::IL3::SequenceMsgKTN::CME::IL3::SequenceRecvMsgLWT::core::Service
The Service struct represents a service KTN::TCP::ServiceDescriptor
Network service parameter set KTN::SessionCallback
Abstract base class that defines the interface for session callbacks. Session callbacks are used to handle various events and actions related to a trading session KTN::CME::IL3::SessionMessageFactory
Responsible for creating various session messages SessionSettings
Struct representing session settings SessionStateManager
Manages the state of a session SessionStatus
Represents the status of a session SessionStatusFormatter
Static method to format a SessionStatus object into a JSON string SessionStatusJsonFormatter
Formatter class for converting SessionStatus objects to JSON format SessStateMsgSessSvc
CME session service.We use this service for persisting session state Settings
Settings collection sidestate
Structure representing the state of a side SimpleEdgeSimpleHashTable
A simple implementation of a hash table KTN::Core::SimpleMap< K, T >
A simple map implementation that associates keys with values KTN::ALGO::SimpleTimer
Simple timer that can be started, stopped, and paused Singleton< T >KTN::Skewer
Implementation of an order book skew trading algorithm SkewerParams
The SkewerParams struct represents the parameters for the Skewer algorithm KTN::SkewTraderSkewTraderParams
The SkewTraderParams struct represents the parameters for the SkewTrader algorithm KTN::notify::slackbot
Structure representing a Slack bot KTN::notify::Slacker
Class representing a Slack-enabled messaging class for alerts and notifications KTN::notify::slackmsg
Structure representing a Slack message KTN::Mdp3::SnapshotFullRefresh52KTN::Mdp3::SnapshotFullRefreshEntryKTN::Mdp3::SnapshotFullRefreshOrderBook53KTN::Mdp3::SnapshotFullRefreshOrderBookEntryKTN::Mdp3::SnapshotRefreshTopOrders59
SnapshotRefreshTopOrders59 KTN::Mdp3::SnapshotRefreshTopOrdersEntryzmq::detail::socket_basezmq::socket_refzmq::socket_tKTN::CME::IL3::SOFHKTN::CME::IL3::sofhHeaderKTN::ALGO::PRICING::SpreadHedgeSpreadHedgeCircBuff
Circular buffer implementation for storing spread hedge data KTN::ALGO::PRICING::SpreadHedgeV3KTN::ALGO::PRICING::SpreadPricer
Pricing strategy for calculating spread prices KTN::Core::SPSCRingBuffer< T >
A single-producer, single-consumer ring buffer implementation KTN::SqueezerOB
Implementation of the SqueezerOB algorithm. THe SqueezerOB algorithm is akin to an OCO order that rests on the order book and watches a "Squeez" price. Once the quantity at the price is lower than the threshold, the order is then modified and moves to the target price. This is the same functionality as "leaning" on an limit order at a price, and acting when the price is "squeezed" by decreases in quantity or the ratio of bid/ask quantity SqueezerParams
The SqueezerParams struct represents the parameters for the Squeezer algorithm SqzOrdParam
The SqzOrdParam struct represents the parameters for a Squeezer order KTN::Stacker
Derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and implements the stacking algorithm. This algorithm "seeds" price levels in an automated fashion based on input parameters and current market conditions StackerParams
The StackerParams struct represents the parameters for the Stacker algorithm KTN::StackerTimer
Derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and TimerCallback. It implements various methods for managing a stacker timer algorithm StackerTimerParams
The StackerTimerParams struct represents the parameters for the StackerTimer algorithm StandardMenu
Standard menu implementation stats
Class representing algorithm statistics KTN::REPORTER::StatusReporter
Responsible for reporting session status KTN::StatusStateStringSplitterStringUtils
A utility class for string manipulation LWT::NET::detail::SwapEndianStruct< T, SIZE >LWT::NET::detail::SwapEndianStruct< T, 1 >LWT::NET::detail::SwapEndianStruct< T, 2 >LWT::NET::detail::SwapEndianStruct< T, 4 >LWT::NET::detail::SwapEndianStruct< T, 8 >tcp_settings
Struct representing TCP settings KTN::TCP::TcpCallback
Abstract base class for TCP callbacks KTN::TCP::TcpCallback8t
Abstract base class for TCP callbacks with 8-bit data TcpErrKTN::TCP::TcpFeedBase
The base class for TCP feed KTN::TCP::TcpSocketKTN::Mdp3::TemplateKTN::CME::IL3::META::TerminateMetaKTN::CME::IL3::TerminateMsgKTN::CME::IL3::TerminateRecvMsgTimedAvgParams
Struct representing the parameters for the Timed Average algorithm TimerCallback
Abstract base class for timer callback functionality TimerIntervalTimerStateKTN::BOOKS::TradeMoleculeKTN::Twap
TWAP (Time-Weighted Average Price) algorithm udp_settings
Struct representing UDP settings UdpCallback
Represents a callback interface for UDP data reception UdpCallbackV3
Represents a callback interface for UDP data reception (version 3) KTN::TCP::UdpSocket
UDP socket KTN::TCP::EFVITcpV5::Conf::UserDataUserInfo
Struct representing user information sole::uuidKTN::BOOKS::VolumeMoleculeKTN::Waves
Weighted Average algorithm class derived from AlgoBaseV3 WavesParams
Struct representing the parameters for the Waves algorithm WavgCalc
Structure representing the weighted average calculation WavgCalcMulti
Class for calculating weighted averages and performing related operations WavgEdgeStruct
Structure representing the weighted average edge information WeightedAverageCalculator
Calculates the weighted average based on price and size KTN::ZF::zf_client_statezmq_event_tZmqLogger
Responsible for logging messages using ZeroMQ ZmqMenu
Menu that uses ZeroMQ for communication ZmqMessage
ZMQ message ZmqPush
Represents a ZMQ push socket for sending messages to a ZMQ pull socket ZmqSubListener
Abstract base class for ZMQ subscriber listeners ZmqSubscriber
ZMQ subscriber ZmqSubscriberV5
A ZMQ subscriber class
